items.name: Chains 💎
items.description:
This fire awesome and classic solid iced out diamond chain / silver necklace has a subtle glowing effect in bright light environments . It's great for any of the coolest and most awsome gamer outfits that want that diamonds glow . Whether you're dressing emo / scene / goth / punk / or Y2K / retro -- wear this epic and icy necklace . The ice part of this necklace is white and looks like a crystal / pearl gem .

items.name: Black Medieval Scarf Armor
items.description:
Trick or Treat? Scare others with your scarecrow scarf armor! This rusty armor is from a Jack'o Sorcerer that already had many different pumpkins faces, do you want to see more options? A cursed pumpkin forever wandering in the halloween lands, looking for the great mages and warriors that made this with him, seeking the vengeance of a berserker. Come check more items of this set at our group!

items.name: Silver G Small Punk Shoulder Bag
items.description:
The G Punk Chain Small Shoulder Bag is crafted in a streamlined silhouette from smooth premium leather accented by shiny silver hardware. It has a classic-chic look made bolder by spike embellishment, a chain shoulder strap and a large turn-lock closure.

Made in partnership with Builder_Boy
